full_text:
Han Kui (Boyan)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Kui, styledBoyan, was born in Guanghan. His superior was killed by Ma Xiang’s Turbans so Kui carried out funeral and helped destroy Turbans before taking his own life. Han Kui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Han Kui lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
